description: O*NET-inspired profession mapping dataset for resume-to-role prediction. Roles are grouped across engineering, AI/ML, data, cloud/devops, security, quality, architecture, and management pathways. Weights are normalized on a 0-1 scale and can be used directly for cosine similarity.

AI Engineer.description: Builds AI-powered applications using machine learning and LLM-based systems.
why_this_role: strong Python and model-building alignment
good fit for applied AI and deployment

BI Developer.description: Builds business intelligence dashboards, reports, and analytics pipelines.
why_this_role: strong reporting and dashboard alignment
good fit for SQL and visualization-heavy work

Backend Engineer.description: Builds server-side services, APIs, and database-backed applications.
why_this_role: strong APIs and database alignment
good fit for system design and service development

Software Engineer.description: Builds production software with strong coding, debugging, and engineering fundamentals.
why_this_role: strong coding and debugging alignment
good fit for general software engineering pathways

Systems Engineer.description: Builds and debugs low-level, platform, and system-oriented software.
why_this_role: strong systems and automation alignment
good fit for platform or low-level software work

Cloud Engineer.description: Designs and operates cloud infrastructure, networking, and deployment workflows.
why_this_role: strong cloud and infrastructure alignment
good fit for deployment and scaling work

Computer Vision Engineer.description: Develops vision systems for image, video, and perception tasks.
why_this_role: strong computer vision and Python alignment
good fit for model training and inference

Data Analyst.description: Analyzes data to produce reports, dashboards, and business insights.
why_this_role: strong SQL and analytics alignment
high fit for student resumes with reporting skills

Data Architect.description: Designs enterprise data models, governance, and warehouse architecture.
why_this_role: requires advanced data architecture knowledge
less common for entry-level resumes

Data Engineer.description: Builds data pipelines, transformations, and warehouse workflows.
why_this_role: strong pipeline and SQL alignment
good fit for backend-style data work

Data Scientist.description: Applies statistics and machine learning to solve analytical problems.
why_this_role: strong statistics and ML alignment
good fit for experimental modeling work

DevOps Engineer.description: Automates builds, deployments, infrastructure, and operational reliability.
why_this_role: strong CI/CD and Linux alignment
good fit for deployment-focused profiles

Embedded Systems Engineer.description: Develops software close to hardware and constrained devices.
why_this_role: strong C/C++ and hardware alignment
good fit for systems-oriented profiles

Frontend Engineer.description: Builds user interfaces and interactive web experiences.
why_this_role: strong JavaScript and UI alignment
good fit for web-focused resumes

Full Stack Developer.description: Builds both client and server parts of web applications.
why_this_role: balanced frontend and backend alignment
good fit for broad web development resumes

Infrastructure Engineer.description: Builds and maintains internal systems, networks, and operational platforms.
why_this_role: strong infra and reliability alignment
good fit for systems-heavy profiles

IoT Engineer.description: Builds connected device systems, sensors, and edge integrations.
why_this_role: strong hardware and connectivity alignment
good fit for device + software profiles

ML Engineer.description: Builds machine learning pipelines and deploys models into production.
why_this_role: strong applied ML alignment
good fit for Python + ML stacks

MLOps Engineer.description: Operationalizes ML models with deployment, monitoring, and lifecycle tooling.
why_this_role: strong deployment and ML lifecycle alignment
good fit for production ML systems

Mobile Engineer.description: Builds mobile applications for Android or cross-platform environments.
why_this_role: good fit for app development skills
strong UI + platform alignment

NLP Engineer.description: Builds language-based ML systems for text understanding and generation.
why_this_role: strong NLP and Python alignment
good fit for language model workflows

Network Engineer.description: Designs and maintains network connectivity, routing, and security.
why_this_role: good fit for networking and infrastructure work
less common for general software resumes

Platform Engineer.description: Builds internal developer platforms and shared engineering tooling.
why_this_role: strong platform and automation alignment
good fit for infrastructure-heavy systems

QA Automation Engineer.description: Builds automated test suites and quality pipelines for software products.
why_this_role: strong testing and automation alignment
good fit for execution-focused QA profiles

QA Engineer.description: Validates software quality through manual and automated testing.
why_this_role: high match for testing-heavy resumes
common entry-level pathway

Release Engineer.description: Manages build, release, and deployment workflows across environments.
why_this_role: strong deployment pipeline alignment
good fit for CI/CD-oriented profiles

Research Scientist.description: Conducts advanced research in machine learning, AI, or applied computing.
why_this_role: requires deep theory and experimentation
less likely for most student resumes

Security Analyst.description: Monitors threats, incidents, and security events across systems.
why_this_role: good fit for security operations skills
common early security role

Security Engineer.description: Builds defenses, hardening, and security controls for systems.
why_this_role: strong security architecture alignment
good fit for infra + security profiles

Site Reliability Engineer.description: Improves service reliability through automation, monitoring, and operations.
why_this_role: strong observability and automation alignment
good fit for production systems

Solutions Architect.description: Designs end-to-end technical solutions across platforms and business needs.
why_this_role: senior systems design role
should not rank high for early-career resumes

Technical Architect.description: Defines system architecture, design standards, and long-term technical direction.
why_this_role: highly senior architecture role
should rank low for student resumes

Product Manager.description: Defines product goals, user value, and delivery priorities.
why_this_role: strong fit for strategy and communication
good for cross-functional leadership

Engineering Manager.description: Leads engineering teams, delivery, and people development.
why_this_role: senior leadership role
should not outrank technical IC roles for most resumes

Project Manager.description: Plans delivery, timelines, dependencies, and execution across teams.
why_this_role: strong fit for planning and coordination
good for operations-heavy profiles

Technical Program Manager.description: Coordinates technical programs across teams, timelines, and dependencies.
why_this_role: hybrid technical + coordination role
good for system-level delivery profiles

Operations Manager.description: Runs operational processes, coordination, and execution across functions.
why_this_role: strong fit for coordination and execution
relevant for management pathways

Team Lead.description: Guides a small team with technical direction and delivery ownership.
why_this_role: mix of leadership and technical depth
good fit for early leadership pathways

Mechanical Engineer.description: Designs mechanical systems, components, and manufacturable products.
why_this_role: strong fit for product design and mechanical analysis work
good match for CAD-driven engineering pathways

Electrical Engineer.description: Builds and analyzes electrical systems, controls, and energy infrastructure.
why_this_role: strong fit for electrical design and simulation-heavy work
good alignment with controls and energy systems profiles

Electronics and Communication Engineer.description: Designs electronic circuits, communication systems, and embedded hardware.
why_this_role: strong electronics and signal-processing alignment
good fit for hardware and communication engineering tracks

Civil Engineer.description: Plans, designs, and supports infrastructure and construction projects.
why_this_role: strong fit for infrastructure, site, and planning work
good alignment with construction and design fundamentals

Chemical Engineer.description: Designs and optimizes chemical processes, process controls, and plant operations.
why_this_role: strong process and simulation alignment
good fit for plant, process, and operations engineering

Aerospace Engineer.description: Develops aircraft and spacecraft systems with strong simulation and design depth.
why_this_role: strong fit for simulation-driven aerospace design
good alignment with fluid, structures, and propulsion work

Biomedical Engineer.description: Builds medical devices, instrumentation, and healthcare-facing engineering systems.
why_this_role: strong fit for regulated device and instrumentation work
good match for engineering profiles bridging hardware and healthcare

Mechatronics Engineer.description: Integrates mechanics, electronics, controls, and embedded software into automated systems.
why_this_role: strong cross-disciplinary hardware and controls alignment
good fit for automation and intelligent machine systems

Industrial Engineer.description: Improves process efficiency, quality, and operational performance across systems.
why_this_role: strong fit for optimization and continuous improvement work
good alignment with quality and operations-focused profiles

Environmental Engineer.description: Designs solutions for water, waste, compliance, and sustainability challenges.
why_this_role: strong fit for sustainability and environmental systems work
good alignment with treatment, compliance, and impact analysis

Robotics Engineer.description: Builds autonomous and semi-autonomous robotic systems spanning software and hardware.
why_this_role: strong fit for autonomous systems and intelligent machines
good alignment with controls, perception, and embedded integration

Automotive Engineer.description: Develops vehicle subsystems, controls, and performance-oriented automotive designs.
why_this_role: strong fit for simulation-led vehicle engineering work
good alignment with modern automotive and EV systems

Materials Engineer.description: Selects, tests, and improves materials for performance, durability, and manufacturability.
why_this_role: strong fit for materials testing and performance engineering
good alignment with metals, polymers, and failure analysis work

Manufacturing Engineer.description: Improves production systems, tooling, and manufacturing workflows for scale and quality.
why_this_role: strong fit for production, tooling, and process-improvement work
good alignment with design-to-manufacture engineering

Power Systems Engineer.description: Designs and analyzes generation, protection, and grid-connected electrical systems.
why_this_role: strong fit for grid, utility, and renewable energy profiles
good alignment with protection and power-system analysis work

candidate_scoring.description: Bounded confidence score for resume evidence on a 0-1 scale.

gap_calculation.description: Signed gap on a -10 to 10 scale.
gap_calculation.precondition: Both jd_importance and candidate_score must be normalized to 0–1 before scaling.

gap_handling.note: negative gaps represent overqualification and are ignored in roadmap generation

similarity_policy.note: soft skills should not dominate cosine similarity for technical roles

role_bias_policy.formula: final_score = ((similarity_weight * similarity * (prior_similarity_floor + prior_similarity_gain * prior * level_bias)) + prior_weight * prior * level_bias + core_overlap_boost - missing_core_penalty) * missing_core_score_scale
role_bias_policy.note: Helps prioritize realistic roles for student resumes while still allowing strong matches to surface.

output_schema.reason: string explanation of why role matched

explanation_templates.role_match: You are a strong fit for {role} due to your skills in {matched_skills}.
explanation_templates.skill_gap: You may improve your fit by learning {missing_skills}.
explanation_templates.combined: You match {role} because of {matched_skills}, but lack {missing_skills}.
explanation_templates.technical: Strong match because the candidate shows core technical alignment in {skills}.
explanation_templates.management: Strong match because the candidate shows coordination and leadership alignment in {skills}.
